::: {.panel-tabset}

## Intercept-Only 

```{stan output.var = "cstan_intercept"}
data {
  // Individual-level data
  int<lower=0> N; // Number of observations
  vector[N] y; // Response variable
  vector[N] x1; // spec_mean_cf variable
  vector[N] x2; // within_spec_cf variable
  
  // Group-level data
  int<lower=0> J; // Number of groups (species)
  array[N] int<lower=1, upper=J> group;  // Group (species) ID
  
  // Phylogenetic data
  matrix[J, J] A_phylo; // phylogenetic vcv matrix
}

parameters {
  real mu; // Population intercept
  real<lower=0> sigma; // Residual error
}

model {
  // Priors
  mu ~ normal(0, 50);
  sigma ~ exponential(1);
  
  // Likelihood
  y ~ normal(mu, sigma);
}

generated quantities {
  vector[N] y_pred; // Posterior predictions
  
  for (i in 1:N) {
    y_pred[i] = normal_rng(mu, sigma);
  }
}
```

## Linear Regression

```{stan output.var = "cstan_linear"}
data {
  // Individual-level data
  int<lower=0> N; // Number of observations
  vector[N] y; // Response variable
  vector[N] x1; // spec_mean_cf variable
  vector[N] x2; // within_spec_cf variable
  
  // Group-level data
  int<lower=0> J; // Number of groups (species)
  array[N] int<lower=1, upper=J> group;  // Group (species) ID
  
  // Phylogenetic data
  matrix[J, J] A_phylo; // phylogenetic vcv matrix
}

parameters {
  real mu; // Population intercept
  real beta_b; // Slope for spec_mean_cf
  real beta_w; // Slope for within_spec_cf
  real<lower=0> sigma; // Residual error
}

model {
  // Priors
  mu ~ normal(0, 50);
  beta_b ~ normal(0, 10);
  beta_w ~ normal(0, 10);
  sigma ~ exponential(1);
  
  // Likelihood
  y ~ normal(mu + beta_b * x1 + beta_w * x2, sigma);
}

generated quantities {
  vector[N] y_pred; // Posterior predictions
  
  for (i in 1:N) {
    y_pred[i] = normal_rng(mu + beta_b * x1[i] + beta_w * x2[i], sigma);
  }
}
```

## MultiPhylo

```{stan output.var = "cstan_multiphylo"}
data {
  // Individual-level data
  int<lower=0> N; // Number of observations
  vector[N] y; // Response variable
  vector[N] x1; // spec_mean_cf variable
  vector[N] x2; // within_spec_cf variable
  
  // Group-level data
  int<lower=0> J; // Number of groups (species)
  array[N] int<lower=1, upper=J> group;  // Group (species) ID
  
  // Phylogenetic data
  matrix[J, J] A_phylo; // phylogenetic vcv matrix
}

parameters {
  // Fixed effects
  real mu; // Population intercept
  real beta_b; // Slope for spec_mean_cf
  real beta_w; // Slope for within_spec_cf
  
  // Variance components
  real<lower=0> sigma_phy; // SD for phylogenetic effect
  real<lower=0> sigma_sp; // SD of species random effects
  vector[J] z_sp; // latent variable for species
  
  // Direct parameterization
  vector[J] phy_eff; // phylogenetic effect (a)
  
  // Residual error
  real<lower=0> sigma;
}

transformed parameters {
  vector[J] sp_eff = sigma_sp * z_sp ; // species effect (s)
}

model {
  // Priors
  mu ~ normal(0, 50);
  beta_b ~ normal(0, 10);
  beta_w ~ normal(0, 10);
  sigma_phy ~ student_t(3, 0, 20);
  sigma_sp ~ student_t(3, 0, 20);
  z_sp ~ normal(0, 1);
  sigma ~ exponential(1);
  
  // Random effects priors
  phy_eff ~ multi_normal(rep_vector(0, J), sigma_phy^2 * A_phylo);
  
  // Likelihood
  for (i in 1:N) {
    y[i] ~ normal(mu + beta_b * x1[i] + beta_w * x2[i] + sp_eff[group[i]] + phy_eff[group[i]], sigma);
  }
}

generated quantities {
  vector[N] y_pred; // Posterior predictions
  
  for (i in 1:N) {
    y_pred[i] = normal_rng(mu + beta_b * x1[i] + beta_w * x2[i] + sp_eff[group[i]] + phy_eff[group[i]], sigma);
  }
}
```

## MultiPhylo (Joint)

```{stan output.var = "cstan_multiphylojoint"}
data {
  // Individual-level data
  int<lower=0> N; // Number of observations
  vector[N] y; // Response variable
  vector[N] x1; // spec_mean_cf variable
  vector[N] x2; // within_spec_cf variable
  
  // Group-level data
  int<lower=0> J; // Number of groups (species)
  array[N] int<lower=1, upper=J> group;  // Group (species) ID
  
  // Phylogenetic data
  matrix[J, J] A_phylo; // phylogenetic vcv matrix
}

parameters {
  // Fixed effects
  real mu; // Population intercept
  real beta_b; // Slope for spec_mean_cf
  real beta_w; // Slope for within_spec_cf
  
  // Variance components
  real<lower=0> sigma_phy; // SD for phylogenetic effect
  real<lower=0> sigma_sp; // SD of species random effects
  vector[J] z_sp; // latent variable for species
  
  // Direct parameterization
  vector[J] phy_eff; // phylogenetic effect (a)
  
  // Residual error
  real<lower=0> sigma;
}

transformed parameters {
  vector[J] sp_eff = sigma_sp * z_sp; // species effect (s)
  row_vector[2] sigma_vec = [sigma_phy, sigma_sp];
}

model {
  // Priors
  mu ~ normal(0, 50);
  beta_b ~ normal(0, 10);
  beta_w ~ normal(0, 10);
  
  sigma_vec ~ multi_student_t(3, rep_vector(0, 2), [[20, 5], [5, 20]]);
  z_sp ~ normal(0, 1);
  sigma ~ exponential(1);
  
  // Random effects priors
  phy_eff ~ multi_normal(rep_vector(0, J), sigma_phy^2 * A_phylo);
  
  // Likelihood
  for (i in 1:N) {
    y[i] ~ normal(mu + beta_b * x1[i] + beta_w * x2[i] + sp_eff[group[i]] + phy_eff[group[i]], sigma);
  }
}

generated quantities {
  vector[N] y_pred; // Posterior predictions
  
  for (i in 1:N) {
    y_pred[i] = normal_rng(mu + beta_b * x1[i] + beta_w * x2[i] + sp_eff[group[i]] + phy_eff[group[i]], sigma);
  }
}
```

## BYM2 parameterization

```{stan output.var = "cstan_bym2"}
data {
  // Individual-level data
  int<lower=0> N; // Number of observations
  vector[N] y; // Response variable
  vector[N] x1; // spec_mean_cf variable
  vector[N] x2; // within_spec_cf variable
  
  // Group-level data
  int<lower=0> J; // Number of groups (species)
  array[N] int<lower=1, upper=J> group;  // Group (species) ID
  
  // Phylogenetic data
  matrix[J, J] A_phylo; // phylogenetic vcv matrix
}

parameters {
  // Fixed effects
  real mu; // Population intercept
  real beta_b; // Slope for spec_mean_cf
  real beta_w; // Slope for within_spec_cf
  
  // Variance components
  real<lower=0> sigma_t; // SD of combined components
  real<lower=0, upper=1> rho; // proportion effect variance
  vector[J] phy_eff; // phylogenetic effect (a)
  vector[J] sp_eff; // species effect (s)
  
  // Residual error
  real<lower=0> sigma;
}

transformed parameters {
  vector[J] convolved_re = sqrt(1 - rho) * phy_eff + sqrt(rho) * sp_eff;
}

model {
  // Priors
  mu ~ normal(0, 50);
  beta_b ~ normal(0, 10);
  beta_w ~ normal(0, 10);
  
  rho ~ beta(0.5, 0.5);
  sigma_t ~ normal(0, 1);
  sigma ~ exponential(1);
  
  // Random effects priors
  phy_eff ~ multi_normal(rep_vector(0, J), A_phylo);
  sp_eff ~ normal(0, 1);
  
  // soft sum-to-zero constraint on phylo effects
  sum(phy_eff) ~ normal(0, 0.001 * J);
  
  // Likelihood
  for (i in 1:N) {
    y[i] ~ normal(mu + beta_b * x1[i] + beta_w * x2[i] + sigma_t * convolved_re[group[i]], sigma);
  }
}

generated quantities {
  vector[N] y_pred; // Posterior predictions
  
  for (i in 1:N) {
    y_pred[i] = normal_rng(mu + beta_b * x1[i] + beta_w * x2[i] + sigma_t * convolved_re[group[i]], sigma);
  }
}
```

:::
